content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally across pharma, IT, capital goods, financials, and FMCG with multiple held names showing strong gap-ups post Q4 results. Global cues supportive (Nasdaq +2.0%, S&P +1.5%). Existing book is meaningfully in the green across nearly every position — focus this tick is to lock in gains via SL trails on winners, not chase new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24200,
      "nifty_resistance": 24800
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4%. Current SL 1035 is already above entry (locks ~5.2% gain). CMP-SL gap = 21.7/1056.70 = 2.05% — within trail-gap discipline (>1%). Holding SL at 1035 is appropriate; target 1110 intact (R1 ~1069, R2 ~1086, then 1110 aligns with structure). No-op MODIFY would be wasted — keeping HOLD-equivalent values here is just confirmation; treating as MODIFY only because new_target stays at 1110 (stored) — actually this is no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "SL 1035 already locks +5.2% above 984 entry; CMP 1056.70 leaves 2.05% trail gap (within 1% floor). No change warranted; let target 1110 work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.78%. SL 121 (-3.3%) intact. MACD bearish crossover but defensive ballast for portfolio. No trail justified as position is slightly underwater."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.36%. Stored SL 1735 already above entry (+2.06% locked). CMP-SL gap = 22.10/1757.10 = 1.26% — meets >1% trail-gap floor. Promoter 2% block sale at ATH is a yellow flag but stock is holding. No-op on stored values — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Duplicate-correct: SL 1735 locks +2% above 1700 entry; CMP 1757 gives 1.26% trail buffer. Promoter distribution at ATH is a watch item, not exit trigger. Hold to target 1820."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.21%. Stored SL 4530 (-0.98% below entry). At only +1.2% gain, breakeven trail not yet earned (rule: +2% before BE). However raising SL marginally to 4540 (still below entry, lower risk) — no, this LOOSENS risk for a long (4540>4530 is tightening). 4540 vs stored 4530 = +0.22% tighten, which is below the 0.5% micro-adjust floor. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%, below +2% breakeven-trail threshold. SL 4530 intact. Defense thesis strong (new CMD, +31% MoM run). Let it work toward target 4875."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.16% — qualifies for breakeven trail. Stored SL already 6960 (above entry, +0.87% locked). CMP-SL gap = 89/7049 = 1.26% — meets >1% trail-gap floor. No change warranted. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 already locks +0.87% above 6900 entry; CMP 7049 leaves 1.26% trail buffer. Q4 +114% PAT, CDMO ramp, Chemours commissioning Jun/Jul — strong tailwinds. Hold to target 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.86%. Below +2% breakeven-trail threshold. SL 828 intact (-1.19% from entry, 2% trail gap from CMP). No change. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Only +0.86% gain — below trail threshold. Stock above Jefferies TP 810; momentum extended after 10x volume spike yesterday. Q4 results pending in May = binary watch. SL 828 intact at -1.2%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 365.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 ≈ flat. SL 365 (-1.08%) intact. Below trail threshold. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Effectively flat. Strong Q4 (+31% PAT), ATH yesterday but profit-booking risk noted. SL 365 = -1.08% from entry, fine. Hold to target 388."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.31%. Below trail threshold. SL 815 intact. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Just entered at +0.3%. Strong Q4 (+22% revenue) but Parachute volume -1% is a watch. SL 815 = -0.6% intact, tight. Let it work to 860."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1260.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.60%. Below +2% trail threshold but barely. Stored SL 1260 already at breakeven+1. CMP-SL gap = 19.10/1279 = 1.49% — within floor. No change warranted. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "SL 1260 locks +0.08% above 1259 entry; gap 1.49% from CMP 1279. Q4 multifold PAT jump (some one-offs flagged), Encora close, mid-cap IT leadership. Hold to 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2960.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.30%. Below +2% trail threshold. Stored SL 3000 (-0.83% from entry). Tightening to 2960 would LOOSEN (2960<3000 — rejected for longs). Tightening UP to higher value would mean SL>3000; with CMP only 3034, any tighten near CMP violates 1% trail-gap. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Only +0.3% gain. Stock +48% in April — extended. Defense cluster discipline (HAL also held) means no add. SL 3000 = -0.83% intact. Hold to 3225."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 798.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.16%. Below trail threshold. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Effectively flat. Q4 +11% rev, +11% PAT. SL 798 = -1% intact. Hold to 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Open MIS LIMIT BUY 600x @ 133.50 placed 33+ hours ago — this order is stale across sessions and should not still be working. Letting it expire/EOD-cancel naturally; not stacking another. (Note: cannot CANCEL via this schema — flagging as a stale-order audit item.)"
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1035.00, "reasoning": "SL already locks +5.2% above entry; trail gap 2% — adequate."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Defensive position slightly underwater; SL -3.3% intact."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1735.00, "reasoning": "SL locks +2%; promoter sale at ATH a watch item but not exit trigger."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4530.00, "reasoning": "Below +2% trail threshold; SL intact."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 6960.00, "reasoning": "SL locks +0.87%; CDMO + Chemours catalysts ahead."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 828.00, "reasoning": "Q4 results binary risk in May — monitor closely."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 365.00, "reasoning": "Flat post-entry; strong Q4 narrative intact."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 815.00, "reasoning": "Tight 0.6% SL just below entry."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1260.00, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+; mid-cap IT leadership."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3000.00, "reasoning": "Slightly positive; SL 0.83% below entry adequate."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 798.00, "reasoning": "Flat; Q4 in line."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "LUPIN Q4 result today = binary tonight, no entry. AUROPHARMA up 7.6% but bearish engulfing recently + Zentiva acquisition leverage risk + Q4 May 30 = pass. POLYCAB strong but at upper Bollinger and lot size economically restrictive given my cash. M&M, BAJAJ-AUTO, MRF — auto cluster, prefer one expression and book is already heavy. HDFCBANK SBIN-Q4-tomorrow binary = pass. HINDPETRO/BPCL = OMC cluster, would need to size carefully. SRF would stack specialty-chem cluster with NAVINFLUOR — pass per cluster discipline.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is fully deployed (~11 CNC names) and almost every position is green today. Several names (PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS, NAVINFLUOR, COFORGE) already have SLs locked above entry which is the right state. Cumulative experiment P&L -53.7% is concerning but largely legacy; current 5-day net is near breakeven. Priority is to LET WINNERS RUN to targets while SLs do the work — not to add more correlated longs into this rip. No new entries this tick. Will reassess pre-close if any SL needs tightening on names that have run further. Stale HFCL MIS order from prior session should auto-cancel at EOD."
}
